reviews.review_description: It doesn't have the feeling of space. There is another game that is better. I like some of the graphics especially warp. It has a lot of promise, with some more of a free floating so you feel like your in space you have a great game.

Those are the kind of game I wish to play on my gear vr: deep gameplay, classic game controls and so on. Just some little suggestion for future upgrade: separate linear ramp from sensitive controll; better have two slide than mix them in a single one. A further suggestion (more technical demanding, I'm afraid), to have a shield and three way power  divert toggle (like in old x-wing game) would be the max. Anyway, this is a great job, keep up the good work!

reviews.review_title: It has the X factor. Awesome!
reviews.review_description: Elite had it, TIE Fighter had it, Wing Commander sort of had it (but not really), and this definately has it! That immersive feeling of bieng in a real believable universe! With a few tweaks (mainly a dampening of the slightly twitchy controls) this could be an absolute classic. I hope the final game makes the most of the beautifully realised world by putting as much emphasis on the skills of docking as dog-fighting. This has soooooo much potential that it would be a crime if it were to end up as just another shoot em up. Don't get me wrong, dog-fighting is great, but this has the foundations of something much bigger. I could see myself trading, mining, exploring, docking (love docking) my way through the galaxy. I almost took a star off because the controls lack a sense of momentum and the ship movement stops too abruptly, and lacks a sense of weight. If that gets sorted, the possibilities for this are huge. I had to give 5 stars though because I've not been this excited about a game for ages!!!
This demo reminded me a lot of Elite Dangerous, a game I really love.  I've never got the chance to play Elite in VR, so this was an awesome experience.

Games like this are my favorites on the platform so far. I thought the steering felt a little too direct/too easy at first, but after a few minutes piloting the ship felt natural. Great looking game, I plan to buy the full version.

I can't wait till this game is complete. I love it its fun 3D depth is very well done. They do need to make the game more action packed at the moment very redundant but it's a demo and have high hopes about this game :).

Nice background graphics but the controls of the ship are very fast. Dear programmer...have you tried the game for more than 1 minute? My brain is wobbling if I have to use the gamepad to turn left or right. Why can't players use their office chair to move left or right?

Where End Space VR feels like Eve Valkyrie with missions, this get feels like Elite Dangerous. The sense of scale is amazing and honestly a little intimidating (the asteroid field is incredibly huge). I love the system computer because it lends the game a more simulation feel (warping between different locations without loading, etc).  The graphics are simplistic but it doesn’t get in the way of the game. Definitely try this if you want something a little more open-world than End Space. The future us bright for VR space games.
This game was awesome.  I've been waiting for a game like this that allows thrust control. I don't get vr sick but could see how others may (they need to quit being sissies lol). Great game.
I bought the full version and discovered the best vr game out there.
I was blown away by how deep this game is.  Immersive!

Good demo of the full game which lets you play the tutorial and two missions as well as multiplayer with some restrictions.  The controls work really well and are easy to get used to.

Ship handling is excellent and navigation is easy. I will certainly be buying the full game after trying this demo.

... you've done there.  Kudos! More Mission, nicer Cockpit and the Steuerung  (i love playing with gamepad  on a swivelchair - yet a fixed chair is more immersive here) with a lot fiddeling and trying i'm quite happig now. This could get a big thing ... take your time and deliver a AAA-Final! ^^

reviews.review_title: Cant say i was super impressed
reviews.review_description: Maybe its because ive played aw2 and vendetta. Maybe its because it was a demo and i didnt see much. Also didnt get to do multiplayer since no one was on during my trial. I was using a gamepad and i felt the controls to be a bit jerky. Then when i went to adjust the controls, i could never seem to get it right. Also the axis descriptions are confusing. The directions i thought i would go based on my selection were not intuitive at all. Im pretty sure this dev is a super nice guy from watching him on reddit, but unfortunately i was not convinced to buy the full game. If the controls had worked better i probably would have been more into it
